verification.S4.A1: PASS - 8 archetypes (TAG, LAG, Nit, CallingStation, Maniac, Rock, Whale, NitReg).
verification.S4.A2: PASS - each archetype has id, display_name, preflop_frequencies (position-keyed), postflop_heuristics, contrast_with_gto.
verification.S4.A3: PASS - decide() seeds an internal RNG from stableHash(state) XOR seed; identical inputs -> identical RNG sequence -> identical outputs.
verification.S4.A4: PASS - decide() reads from profile but never assigns to it; ARCHETYPES are deepFrozen at module load.
verification.S4.A5: PASS - every archetype's contrast_with_gto contains paragraph breaks and is >300 characters.
